reason: Response A shows more inventive, layered comic escalation with original conceits (the "Lint Tax" as a greedy government, the sock as a naive wormhole traveler, the avocado-sock folk hero, the witness sock "remembering nothing"), denser figurative language, and a sharper structural payoff per paragraph. Response B is funny and coherent but leans on more conventional, widely-circulated bits (black-market exchange, sock sentience, the sock reappearing only after you toss its partner), reading like the safer, mid-tier take. The richer metaphorical density and willingness to commit to absurd through-lines mark A as the Opus piece.
